_hooks_note: Hook commands run in the SESSION's cwd, not the project root, so a bare relative path
breaks the moment anything cds away — and a hook that cannot find its script ERRORS,
which BLOCKS the tool call instead of failing open. That is the opposite of what both
gates promise in their docstrings. Hence $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR (set by Claude Code to the
project root) and the `|| true`: a missing, broken, or unreadable gate must never brick
a cycle. Verified 2026-07-16 by cd-ing outside the repo — both gates go quiet, and the
org keeps working. Do not shorten these back to `python3 scripts/<gate>.py`.
